game_name: Prince of Persia 2: The Shadow and the Flame

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundation mechanic, practiced in opening sequences
Avoidance and timing in initial areas
Guards pursuing player during escape sequence
Reanimated skeletons attack player; escalates threat level
Enemies may flank player; replacements spawn on kills
Aerial hazards combined with ground threats
Puzzle solving and combat enhancement; willful separation from body
Final puzzle solution; obtained through shadow ability use
Boss-like encounters; respond to player's shadow/flame mastery
Return to Persia for final confrontation

typical_relief_triggers: Enemy encounters ending with reinforcements stopping
typical_tension_triggers: Transition to new dangerous area (skeleton cave, Basra ruins)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive escalation from evasion-based to combat-heavy; alternates between contemplative vision sequences (relief) and intense action sequences (tension); structured around location transitions that each introduce new threat types

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Vision sequences and narrative reveals occur at transition points between major locations

difficulty_curve.early_game: Evasion-focused with basic platforming; single or no enemies; establishes core movement mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Transition from evasion to combat; introduction of multiple simultaneous enemies; new enemy types (skeletons, flying hazards); introduction of special abilities (shadow)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Combat-heavy with enemy reinforcements; mastery of shadow ability required for puzzle solutions; integration of multiple mechanics (magic horse, flame collection, warrior monks)
notable_spikes: Island skeleton cave section (first major threat escalation)
Basra ruins with flying enemies (introduces aerial hazards)
Red temple warrior monks (requires shadow ability mastery)

notable_level_patterns.description: Player must evade guards while navigating platforming challenges; establishes evasion as core early gameplay loop
Enclosed spaces filled with undead or supernatural enemies; combines environmental hazards with enemy encounters

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Open ruins with multiple threat types
notable_level_patterns.description: Larger areas mixing ground and aerial hazards; requires navigation strategy
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Basra ruins (screaming goblin heads, snakes, traps)

notable_level_patterns.description: Temple areas serve as narrative checkpoints where new abilities are obtained and mastered; enemies respond to player progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Red temple with bird warrior monks
